name: Bring-up
description: MUX-level bring-up calibration: ConfigureAll -> resonator spectroscopy. Requires explicit mux_ids and runs once per selected MUX.

name: Experimental Simultaneous Bring-up
description: Experimental single-execution bring-up with resonator spectroscopy, all-qubit simultaneous spectroscopy, and regular bring-up follow-up tasks. Requires explicit mux_ids or qids.

name: Check Waveform
description: Readout waveform inspection using qubex CheckWaveform for explicitly selected MUXes or qubits.

name: Simple Calibration
description: Basic calibration for learning and simple tasks. Requires explicit mux_ids or qids, with customizable tasks and execution modes.

name: 1Q Calibration
description: 1-qubit calibration using step-based pipeline. Requires explicit mux_ids or qids and supports check-only or full calibration with fine-tune.

name: Full Calibration
description: Complete calibration for explicitly selected mux_ids using step-based pipeline: ConfigureAll -> 1Q Check -> 1Q Fine-tune -> Filter -> CR Schedule (forward/reverse) -> 2Q.

name: Fast Full Calibration
description: Shortened full calibration for explicitly selected mux_ids: ConfigureAll -> fast 1Q check -> 1Q fine-tune without T1/T2 averages -> Filter -> CR Schedule -> 2Q.

name: 2Q Calibration
description: Two-qubit calibration from candidate qubits. Auto-generates optimal CR schedule with explicit checkerboard direction (forward/reverse). Default: forward.

name: 2Q Scheduled Calibration
description: Two-qubit calibration with user-defined schedule. Specify qubit pairs and parallel groups directly.

name: Parallel Retry Calibration
description: Parallel execution with @task + submit(). Demonstrates retry logic with frequency offset.

name: Fake Backend Calibration
description: Calibration with backend switching. Use backend_name='fake' for testing, 'qubex' for production. Customize tasks list for provenance testing.

name: Gate Coherence Limit
description: Calculate theoretical fidelity limit of 1Q and 2Q gates for explicitly selected mux_ids or qids from T1, T2 coherence times and gate duration.
